## OperatorManifest — blindspot.bet
## Version: 0.2
## Date: 2026-03-17
## Operator: Dave Kitchens
## Studio: Dropdown Logistics (DDL)
## Status: LIVE — Auth, Schema, API, Governance all deployed
## Format: llms.txt extended (OperatorManifest standard, CR-CANON-001)

---

## WHAT CHANGED IN v0.2

v0.1 -> v0.2 (2026-03-17):
- Clerk auth deployed — sign-in, sign-up, ClerkProvider, middleware
- 8 API routes live and tested end-to-end
- Neon PostgreSQL schema migrated (Fact_Bets, Fact_Rebuys, User, WaitlistEntry)
- Token economy tested: create user -> place bet -> settle W -> correct payout
- Orbital hero landing page deployed — helix mark at center, 5 feature nodes
- Governance page live at /governance
- Welcome modal deployed — one-time, localStorage, NCPG helpline embedded
- Scope Declaration live at /scope (CR-BLINDSPOT-001 ratified)
- Dynamic OG image live at /api/og (1200x630, branded)
- Open Graph + Twitter Card meta tags wired in layout.tsx
- Favicon updated to canonical D&A brand kit paths
- Free access commitment added to governance framework
- Council reviews completed: CR-BLINDSPOT-001, CR-DDL-LIVE-001, CR-FANTASYFORGE-001
- CR-TRADEFORGE-001 sent — responses pending
- OperatorManifest promoted from /public to /llms.txt (standard path)

---

## IDENTITY

Product:          blindspot.bet
Operator:         Dave Kitchens
Studio:           Dropdown Logistics (DDL)
URL:              https://blindspot.bet
Sub-brand:        D&A Analytics
Collaborator:     Alex (Dave's cousin, professional trader)
Version:          0.2
Status:           LIVE — Early Access — Waitlist collecting — Auth live
Stack:            Next.js (App Router) / Vercel / Neon PostgreSQL / Clerk / Cloudflare
Repo:             github.com/dropdownlogistics/blindspot-bet
Domain:           blindspot.bet — registered Cloudflare, $20.20, .bet TLD
Purpose:          A governed sports betting analytics platform that surfaces behavioral
                  blind spots from bet log data. A data layer for the bettor.

---

## WHAT THIS PRODUCT IS

blindspot.bet is a data layer for the bettor.
It tracks every bet. It surfaces every pattern. It names the blind spots.

It is NOT a sportsbook.
It is NOT a picks service.
It is NOT gambling advice.
It does NOT predict outcomes.
It does NOT handle real money.
It does NOT claim edge generation — it reveals edge and leak.
It does NOT recommend bets.
It does NOT profit from gambling activity.

Architectural identity: signal -> structure -> edge
The signal is raw bet log data.
The structure is the governed schema — Fact_Bets at center.
The edge is what the splits reveal when the data accumulates.

The house does not have better odds. It has better data.
blindspot.bet is the data layer built for the other side of that equation.

---

## RESPONSIBLE USE

The operator has personal experience with addiction (sobriety: 8 years).
This product was built with awareness of what a gateway looks like.
A one-time welcome modal on first visit surfaces the NCPG helpline (1-800-522-4700)
and the operator's direct note before any user accesses the product.
A free tier is committed — core logging will always be free.
Paywalling pattern visibility contradicts the purpose of building this.

---

## METHODOLOGY

Built in one session (March 14, 2026 — Friday night).
Zero code existed before 9pm CT. Full stack live by 5am CT.

Operator methodology: Chaos -> Structured -> Automated
Applied universally across all DDL products.
Schema designed before UI. Governance baked in before any user-facing layer.
Star schema thinking applied to all domains.

Token economy origin: SimCasino (DDL, council-reviewed v1.0)
  - Append-only ledger
  - De-monetized terminology
  - EV tracking methodology
  - Free rebuy with full event logging

---

## DATA MODEL

FACT TABLES (center)

  Fact_Bets (Bet)
    Grain:      One row per bet placed per user
    Fields:     id, userId, betDate, sport, betType, platform, oddsEntry,
                stakeTokens, result, netChange, tokenBalanceAfter,
                contextNote, sessionId, parlayId, isLeg, exitValue,
                fullPayoutValue, createdAt
    Status:     LIVE on Neon PostgreSQL

  Fact_Rebuys (Rebuy)
    Grain:      One row per token stack reset per user
    Fields:     id, userId, priorBalance, tokensReceived, triggerContext, createdAt
    Status:     LIVE on Neon PostgreSQL — append-only

DIMENSIONS (designed, not yet built as separate tables)
  Dim_Sport           Sport dimension
  Dim_BetType         Bet type dimension
  Dim_Platform        Platform dimension
  Dim_MarketContext   Market context notes (VIX, news catalyst, macro)
  Dim_TimeOfDay       Entry time bucket

SUPPORTING TABLES
  User              id, email, tokenBalance (default 1000), createdAt
  WaitlistEntry     email, createdAt

PLANNED SCHEMA ADDITIONS
  Fact_DecisionLog  Decision log protocol — pending build
  Dim_TraderBias    Market context layer — pending build

---

## TOKEN ECONOMY

Currency:           Tokens (simulation units — no real-world value)
Starting balance:   1,000 tokens per account
Win payout:         Calculated from American odds at entry
Loss deduction:     Full stake deducted immediately at bet placement
Rebuy:              Free, unlimited. Every rebuy logged. Frequency = behavioral signal.
Terminology (de-monetized):
  token balance     (not bankroll)
  net change        (not profit/loss)
  observed win rate (not hit rate)
  stake             (acceptable — context makes it neutral)

TESTED END-TO-END:
  User created -> 1,000 tokens
  NBA Spread bet at -110 -> 100 tokens staked -> balance 900
  Settled W -> +91 tokens -> balance 1,091 (correct American odds math)

---

## PAGES LIVE

/                   Orbital hero landing. Two-column layout.
                    Helix mark at orbital center. 5 feature nodes.
                    Rotating arc segment. Arc text stamp.
                    Ticker. Stats grid. Feature cards.
                    Dashboard preview. Waitlist CTA.

/how-it-works       5-step flow. Token economy table.
                    Rebuy signal with sample log. 6 dashboard metrics.

/glossary           7 categories. 46 terms. Full product vocabulary.
                    Token Economy, Bet Tracking, Performance Metrics,
                    Behavioral Layer, Bet Types, Platform & Lines,
                    DDL/SimCasino Canon.

/scope              Scope Declaration v1.0 — what this product IS and IS NOT.
                    Council-ratified CR-BLINDSPOT-001. Footer linked.

/governance         Governance framework. Founder note (operator voice, direct).
                    NCPG helpline embedded. Decision Log Protocol (pending).
                    Outcome Reconciliation Rule (pending). Free access commitment.
                    Token Economy Boundary (live). Council ratification note.

/sign-in            Clerk auth — D&A themed dark modal.
/sign-up            Clerk auth — D&A themed dark modal.
/llms.txt           This document.
/api/og             Dynamic OG image — 1200x630, branded, confirmed working.

---

## API ROUTES (all live, tested end-to-end)

POST   /api/user         Create user — 1,000 token balance
GET    /api/user         User stats + last 10 bets + rebuy count + ROI
POST   /api/bets         Log bet — stakes tokens, validates balance
PATCH  /api/bets/[id]    Settle bet — American odds payout, updates balance
GET    /api/bets         Bet history for user
POST   /api/rebuys       Free rebuy — resets to 1,000, logs event
GET    /api/rebuys       Rebuy history for user
POST   /api/waitlist     Email capture via Resend (confirmed — fires to DDL gmail)
GET    /api/og           Dynamic OG image — Vercel Edge runtime

PUBLIC ROUTES (no auth required):
  /, /how-it-works, /glossary, /scope, /governance,
  /llms.txt, /api/waitlist, /api/og, /sign-in(.*), /sign-up(.*)

PROTECTED ROUTES (Clerk auth required):
  /dashboard, /log, /api/bets, /api/user, /api/rebuys

---

## FEATURES LIVE

  Orbital hero landing    Helix mark at center of rotating ring.
                          5 feature nodes at spoke ends. Branded D&A.
  Clerk auth              Sign-in, sign-up, ClerkProvider, middleware.
  Waitlist capture        Resend integration. Confirmed working.
  Welcome modal           One-time. localStorage key bs_welcomed.
                          NCPG helpline. Operator note. Governance link.
  Governance button       Fixed bottom-right. Links to /governance.
  Dynamic OG image        /api/og — Vercel Edge. Branded 1200x630.
  Open Graph tags         og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url,
                          og:site_name, og:locale, og:type,
                          twitter:card, twitter:image — all wired.

---

## FEATURES DEFERRED

/dashboard              Token balance trajectory, ROI by split, blind spot flags
/log                    Bet entry UI — 3-tap mobile form
Auth user sync          Clerk webhook -> Neon User record on signup
Decision Log Protocol   contextNote required at API level
Outcome Reconciliation  Immutable bet entry, append-only settlement
Tilt detection          Stake spike, late-night flag, rebuy clustering
Cash-out tracker        Actual vs full payout delta
Parlay leg tracking     Leg-by-leg EV
The Odds API            Live lines integration
dim_MarketContext       Market context notes layer
dim_TraderBias          Behavioral fingerprint per user
Mobile app              React Native — post-web-v0.1
PDF/XLSX export         Later
Free tier               Manual logging / CSV import — committed, not yet built

---

## DESIGN SYSTEM

Brand:              D&A Analytics (sub-brand of Dropdown Logistics)
Design system:      CottageHumble-adjacent — dark, data-forward, no white

COLOR TOKENS
  --bg:             #0D2137   (D&A navy — deeper than DDL navy #0D1B2A)
  --surface:        #0a1a2e
  --card:           #0f2237
  --green:          #22C55E   (Dave green — primary — d strand)
  --green-light:    #86EFAC   (Alex green — secondary — a strand)
  --neutral:        #E2E8F0
  --text-mid:       #6B8AA0
  --text-dim:       #2A4A60
  --border:         #1A3048
  --border-green:   #22C55E30
  --red:            #EF4444

TWO-GREEN SYSTEM: Dave green (#22C55E) and Alex green (#86EFAC) are structural.
d = Dave, a = Alex, the helix has two strands because there are two people.
Do not flatten to a single green. Do not swap.

TYPOGRAPHY
  Space Grotesk     — display, headings, UI
  JetBrains Mono    — data, labels, meta, code
  Source Serif 4    — italic accent phrases, editorial

LOGO / HELIX MARK
  Double-helix SVG. Two crossing bezier strands (#22C55E + #86EFAC).
  Three horizontal rungs (#E2E8F0). Rounded square container (#0f2237).
  Canonical viewBox: 0 0 26 26
  Strand 1 (Dave): M9 3C9 3 17 7 17 10.5C17 14 9 16 9 19.5C9 23 17 24 17 24
  Strand 2 (Alex): M17 3C17 3 9 7 9 10.5C9 14 17 16 17 19.5C17 23 9 24 9 24
  Rungs: y=7.5, y=13, y=18.5 — #E2E8F0
  Source: dna_helix_mark.pdf, DNA_Final_BrandSet_2.pdf (canonical)

ORBITAL HERO PATTERN
  Product mark at center of rotating orbital ring.
  5 feature nodes at spoke ends (canonical count).
  Rotating arc segment: primary accent, 12-14s animation.
  Arc text: product tagline + domain.
  First named deployment: blindspot.bet (March 14, 2026).

RULES
  No white backgrounds. No Inter. No Roboto. No light mode.
  Source Serif 4 italic reserved for emotional accent phrases only.
  D&A navy (#0D2137) is distinct from DDL navy (#0D1B2A). Never normalize.

VOICE
  Direct. Data-grounded. Short sentences. Strong verbs.
  No "unlock", "empower", "supercharge".
  No gambling encouragement — we track, we reveal, we do not advise.
  No prediction claims. No outcome guarantees.

---

## COLLABORATORS

Dave Kitchens       Operator. CPA. 10+ years internal audit.
                    Commission Analyst II, UMB Bank.
                    Sobriety: 8 years. ADHD. Star schema thinking applied
                    universally. Built blindspot.bet in one Friday night session.

Alex                Dave's cousin. Professional trader.
                    117% return over 16.5 months across three market conditions.
                    157+ trades documented. ORB + MA Bounce strategies.
                    98-99% probability edge confirmed statistically.
                    Does the math with a pen. The instinct is there.
                    blindspot.bet is the tooling.
                    D&A: d = Dave, a = Alex.

---

## GOVERNANCE

COMPLETED
  Scope Declaration v1.0    /scope — CR-BLINDSPOT-001 ratified
                            What this product IS and IS NOT. Locked.
  Token Economy Boundary    Closed simulation currency. No real money. Locked.
  Welcome Modal             One-time operator note + NCPG helpline. Live.
  Governance Page           /governance — full framework visible. Live.
  Free Access Commitment    Core logging will always be free. Locked.
  OperatorManifest v0.2     This document. /llms.txt. Live.

PENDING (in build)
  Decision Log Protocol     contextNote required at API level.
                            Every bet must have a rationale at entry.
                            Cannot retroactively justify after settlement.
  Outcome Reconciliation    Original bet entry immutable after placement.
                            Prevents retroactive reframing of bad decisions.
  Auth User Sync            Clerk webhook -> Neon User record on signup.
  Clerk Production Mode     Development mode badge — promote to production.

RATIFIED BOUNDARIES (immovable)
  blindspot.bet is NOT a picks service.
  blindspot.bet does NOT predict outcomes.
  blindspot.bet does NOT handle real money.
  blindspot.bet does NOT issue betting advice.
  Token economy is simulation-only. Zero financial value.
  Core logging will always be free.
  These lines do not move.

---

## COUNCIL REVIEWS

CR-BLINDSPOT-001    Session 1 build review + next steps
                    6x STRONG, 2x STABLE — unanimous on auth -> bet log -> dashboard
                    Scope Declaration ratified as first governance insertion

CR-DDL-LIVE-001     Live product review — all three DDL sites browsed by council
                    blindspot.bet: 3x STRONG, 3x STABLE, 1x FRAGILE (pre-auth)
                    Flags: depth one click too deep, CTA generic,
                    glossary not prominent enough

CR-FANTASYFORGE-001 Fantasy sports engine concept scoping
                    3x CONDITIONAL — Q3 2026 at earliest
                    D&A module (Option C) recommended
                    MVP: draft grade card before NFL draft April 24

CR-TRADEFORGE-001   Alex's trading analytics engine
                    Build-adjacent. Council review in progress.
                    Responses pending.

---

## ORIGIN

November 30, 2023 — Dave's first-ever AI thread (ChatGPT).
A sports pick'em tracker for fun. Participants named "Jayhawk Jumper"
and "Homer Runson." The sentence that started everything DDL became:
"Please feel free to collaborate with me and be more conversational."
blindspot.bet is that idea, matured through 26+ months of building.
Same vision. The infrastructure finally caught up.

---

## NEXT BUILD SEQUENCE

1. Auth user sync — Clerk webhook creates Neon User record on signup
2. Bet log UI — mobile-first form, hits POST /api/bets
3. Dashboard UI — token balance, ROI by split, recent bets
4. Decision Log Protocol — contextNote required at API level
5. Outcome Reconciliation — immutable entry, append-only settlement
6. Free tier — manual logging + CSV import
7. Tilt detection — stake spike, late-night flag, rebuy clustering
8. The Odds API — live lines at bet entry
9. Mobile app — React Native (post-web-v0.1)

---

## CANON TERMS

signal -> structure -> edge   Tagline. LOCKED.
                              Signal = raw bet log data.
                              Structure = governed Fact_Bets schema.
                              Edge = what the splits reveal.

built by two people           Footer canon. LOCKED.
who share actual DNA          Dave + Alex. Cousins. The d and the a.

Blind Spot                    A pattern you couldn't see without instrumentation.
                              The product is named for this moment.

Token                         Simulation currency. No real-world value.
                              Not redeemable. SimCasino lineage.

Rebuy Signal                  Every rebuy is a data point.
                              Frequency = behavioral pattern.
                              Eight rebuys in a month tells you something.

OrbitalHero                   Landing page pattern. Product mark at center
                              of rotating orbital ring. 5 nodes at spoke ends.
                              Deployed: blindspot.bet (March 14, 2026).
                              Pattern named and canonized here.

CoherentVelocity              Domain to working authenticated API with orbital
                              landing, OG card, and governance page in one session.

AcceptableArrogance           Knowing what you built, letting the work prove it.

---

## RULES FOR AI COLLABORATORS

You are working inside a governed analytics product.
The operator thinks in star schemas. Match that register.
Fact table at center. Dimensions clean. Behavior in the splits.

Tone: data-forward, direct, no hype. Short sentences. Strong verbs.
Do not suggest gambling. Do not advise on picks. Do not predict outcomes.
Do not break the simulation framing — tokens are not money.

When generating UI: D&A brand tokens only. No white. No Inter. No light mode.
When generating schema: Fact_Bets at center, dimensions explicit, grain stated.
When generating copy: signal -> structure -> edge is the lens.
When generating governance content: write like someone who understands
  what a gateway looks like — not like legal boilerplate.

The two-green system is structural. Dave green (#22C55E) is primary.
Alex green (#86EFAC) is secondary. Do not flatten. Do not swap.

D&A navy (#0D2137) is distinct from DDL navy (#0D1B2A). Never normalize.

Do not confuse blindspot.bet with the DDL trading module (BlindSpot Trading).
They share a brand family. They are separate products.

Connor's governance flag is partially resolved. Decision Log and Outcome
Reconciliation are still pending. Do not architect features that deepen
consequence-driven fracture risk before these are ratified.

The operator has personal experience with addiction. The responsible use
framework is genuine, not performative. Treat it accordingly.

The operator decides. The council advises. You advise.

---

blindspot.bet OperatorManifest v0.2
Dropdown Logistics — Chaos -> Structured -> Automated
signal -> structure -> edge
2026-03-17
